summary: Frontend-only testing of Paint Shop color selection bug fix. The reported bug (color applying to entire page background) is FIXED. All paint shop features tested and working correctly.

issues: Color overlay affects the entire truck preview container rectangle (not just the truck image) - this is expected behavior for the CSS mix-blend-mode technique but may not be the ideal visual result
design_issues.severity: LOW - Cosmetic only, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: The current implementation uses inline styles with mix-blend-mode: multiply which is properly scoped - no global CSS variables are injected
The color overlay div uses 'absolute inset-0' which fills the container, but only visually affects the truck preview area
Page-level backgrounds (body, html, main, header, sidebar) remain completely unaffected by color changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paint Shop color selection bug is confirmed fixed. The color overlay properly uses inline styles with mix-blend-mode and does not inject global CSS variables. Page backgrounds remain unchanged.

Primary_Color_Selection.details: Tested Fire Engine Red, Royal Blue, Bright Yellow, custom hex colors - all apply to truck only

Secondary_Color_Selection.details: Secondary color target toggle works, Charcoal Black tested

Color_Palette_Categories.details: Classic, Blues, Reds & Oranges, Greens & Earth, Metallic, Special categories all work

Custom_Hex_Input.details: Custom hex #00ff00 entered and applied correctly

Color_Picker_Tool.details: Native color picker works and updates truck preview

Two_Tone_Patterns.details: Horizontal Split, Diagonal Split, Hood & Roof, Racing Stripe, Lower Accent patterns all work

Finish_Types.details: High Gloss, Satin, Matte, Metallic, Pearl finishes all work with visual effects

Save_Design_Button.details: Save button (data-testid='save-design-btn') works, shows success toast 'Design saved!'

Business_Name_Display.details: Business name 'TACOS EL JEFE' displays on truck with proper contrast color

Bug_Fix_Verification.original_bug: Color applied to entire page background
Bug_Fix_Verification.details: Verified across multiple color selections (red, blue, yellow, green, magenta) - page background remains unchanged

technical_verification.conclusion: Page-level styles remain identical before and after color changes
